title: microseris troximoides
intro: Microseris troximoides, also known as California daisy or false daisy, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America. It is used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microseris troximoides include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including tea, tincture, and infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
